attributes._cssText: body { font: 16px / 1.45 system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 860px; margin: 48px auto; padding: 0px 24px; color: rgb(23, 32, 42); }dt { font-weight: 700; margin-top: 14px; }dd { margin: 4px 0px 0px; }code { background: rgb(243, 245, 247); padding: 2px 5px; border-radius: 4px; }.state { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgb(236, 253, 245); color: rgb(6, 95, 70); }.failed { background: rgb(254, 242, 242); color: rgb(153, 27, 27); }.muted { color: rgb(95, 107, 122); }

#demo-caption { position: fixed; top: 18px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 99999; background: rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.94); color: rgb(226, 232, 240); border-width: 1px 1px 1px 4px; border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(51, 65, 85) rgb(51, 65, 85) rgb(51, 65, 85) rgb(251, 191, 36); border-image: initial; border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 22px; max-width: 66%; font: 700 21px / 1.35 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55) 0px 10px 34px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s; pointer-events: none; }#demo-caption.show { opacity: 1; }#demo-caption .sub { display: block; margin-top: 6px; font-weight: 400; font-size: 15px; color: rgb(148, 163, 184); }

#demo-spot-back { position: fixed; inset: 0px; z-index: 99990; pointer-events: none; background: transparent; opacity: 0; transition: none; }#demo-spot-back.show { opacity: 0; }#demo-spot { position: fixed; z-index: 99992; pointer-events: none; border-radius: 10px; border: 3px solid rgb(251, 191, 36); box-shadow: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.28) 0px 0px 0px 3px, rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.6) 0px 0px 22px 4px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s; }#demo-spot.show { opacity: 1; }

#demo-readable-back { position: fixed; inset: 0px; z-index: 99996; pointer-events: none; background: transparent; backdrop-filter: none; opacity: 0; transition: none; }#demo-readable-back.show { opacity: 0; }#demo-readable-select { position: fixed; z-index: 99998; pointer-events: none; box-sizing: border-box; border: 3px solid rgb(251, 191, 36); border-radius: var(--rz-source-radius,10px); opacity: 0; box-shadow: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.25) 0px 0px 0px 3px, rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.72) 0px 0px 30px 8px; transition: top 0.18s, left 0.18s, width 0.18s, height 0.18s, opacity 0.16s, box-shadow 0.5s; }#demo-readable-select.show { opacity: 1; box-shadow: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.32) 0px 0px 0px 4px, rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.9) 0px 0px 44px 12px; }#demo-readable-zoom { position: fixed; z-index: 99999; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; background: var(--rz-bg,#fff); color: var(--rz-color,#0f172a); border: 3px solid rgb(251, 191, 36); border-radius: var(--rz-source-radius,10px); box-shadow: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.22) 0px 0px 0px 3px, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.54) 0px 32px 96px, rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.62) 0px 0px 50px; padding: 0px; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transform-origin: left top; transition: top 0.68s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.92, 0.18, 1), left 0.68s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.92, 0.18, 1), width 0.68s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.92, 0.18, 1), height 0.68s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.92, 0.18, 1), border-radius 0.68s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.92, 0.18, 1), opacity 0.2s, box-shadow 0.68s; }#demo-readable-zoom.show { opacity: 1; }#demo-readable-zoom.returning { transition-duration: 0.46s; }#demo-readable-zoom .rz-stage { width: 100%; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: auto; overscroll-behavior: contain; padding: 0px; transition: padding 0.68s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.92, 0.18, 1); }#demo-readable-zoom .rz-source-copy { min-width: 100%; width: 100%; min-height: 100%; transform-origin: left top; transition: font-size 0.68s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.92, 0.18, 1), line-height 0.68s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.92, 0.18, 1), padding 0.68s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.92, 0.18, 1); box-sizing: border-box !important; margin: 0px !important; max-width: none !important; }#demo-readable-zoom * { box-sizing: border-box; }

.kitsoki-text-breath { display: inline-block; position: relative; z-index: 1; padding: 0.02em 0.18em; margin: 0px 0.02em; border-radius: 0.24em; border: 1px solid rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.3); background-color: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.08); transform: scale(1); transform-origin: center center; transition: transform 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.78, 0.25, 1), border-color 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.78, 0.25, 1), background-color 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.78, 0.25, 1), font-weight 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.78, 0.25, 1); font-weight: normal !important; }.kitsoki-text-breath.kitsoki-text-breath--big { transform: scale(1.28); border-color: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.9); background-color: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.2); font-weight: 900 !important; }.kitsoki-text-breath.kitsoki-text-breath--small { transform: scale(0.94); border-color: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.15); background-color: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.04); font-weight: normal !important; }

childNodes.textContent: — ghagent: update comment after 3 attempt(s): ticket.comment_edit: gh: Bad credentials (HTTP 401)
— ghagent: update comment after 3 attempt(s): ticket.comment_edit: gh: Bad credentials (HTTP 401)

node.textContent: The hosted page proves the VM-backed job exists and is readable.
The page exposes the route, state, source, and run URL a reviewer needs.
